narrative:
Upper Sandusky Ex Vill Sd (Wyandot) exempted village school district has 7,450 registered voters, with 50.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.9 percentage points.
